title: Assistant Store Manager - Pantaloons Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Pantaloons Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pantaloons Ventures Solutions:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons Ventures Solutions!
jsonLd.skills: Visual Merchandising, Retail Operations, Customer Service, Loss Prevention, Shrinkage Control, KPI Management, MS Excel, Category Management
